creator: dewayne@heuristicsystems.com.au
text:
(In reply to VVD from comment #6)
Timur, you've really done a wonderful job providing (& maintaining) the samba* ports, for all.  It has to be one of, if not the most complex port in the ports suite.  I just reviewed the patch-vfs_freebsd and appreciate the design & effort that has gone into it.  Being a samba jailer, I'm looking forward to upgrading my Samba AD in the very near future.
Thank-you.
